title: Use the Registrations API to manage tax registrations
excerpt: Learn how to add, schedule, and check active tax registrations. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Connect platform](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/registrations-api.md?tax-integration=connect-platform) - [Direct usage](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/registrations-api.md?tax-integration=direct)
